create-pdf-with-filled-arc-graph.title: Create PDF with Filled Arc Graph
create-pdf-with-filled-arc-graph.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document, add a Graph containing a filled arc with custom colors, and conditionally handle GDI+ availability on Windows.

add-unfilled-arc-with-line-width-and-das.title: Add Unfilled Arc with Custom Line Width and Dash Style to PDF
add-unfilled-arc-with-line-width-and-das.description: Demonstrates creating an unfilled arc in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, setting its line width and dash pattern, and placing it inside a Graph container on a page.

add-filled-circle-to-pdf.title: Add Filled Circle to PDF with Aspose.Pdf Graph
add-filled-circle-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF document, adding a Graph that spans the page, and drawing a filled circle with a specified center and radius, including platform‑specific handling for GDI+.

create-bezier-curve-pdf.title: Create Bezier Curve in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
create-bezier-curve-pdf.description: Shows how to draw a cubic Bezier curve using four control points on a PDF page and set its stroke color using Aspose.Pdf.

add-filled-bezier-curve-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Filled Bezier Curve with Opacity to PDF Graph
add-filled-bezier-curve-to-pdf-graph.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph, draw a Bezier curve, set a semi‑transparent fill color and border thickness, and save the document.

draw-straight-line-with-custom-cap.title: Draw Straight Line with Custom Cap in PDF
draw-straight-line-with-custom-cap.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a page, and draws a red straight line between two points with a specified line cap style.

add-multiple-colored-line-segments-to-pd.title: Add Multiple Colored Line Segments to a PDF Graph
add-multiple-colored-line-segments-to-pd.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph in Aspose.Pdf, adding several Line shapes with different colors, and saving the PDF while handling non‑Windows GDI+ requirements.

add-rounded-rectangle-with-fill-to-pdf.title: Add Rounded Rectangle with Fill to PDF
add-rounded-rectangle-with-fill-to-pdf.description: The example creates a PDF document, adds a Graph container, defines a rectangle with rounded corners, applies a solid fill and border, and saves the file while handling platform‑specific GDI+ requirements.

add-filled-rectangle-dashed-border-to-pd.title: Add Filled Rectangle with Dashed Border to PDF Graph
add-filled-rectangle-dashed-border-to-pd.description: Shows how to create a Graph on a PDF page and draw a rectangle with a light‑gray fill, black dashed border, and custom line width using Aspose.Pdf.

create-ellipse-in-pdf-graph.title: Create Ellipse in PDF using Aspose.Pdf Graph
create-ellipse-in-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to draw an ellipse on a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf by defining horizontal and vertical radii, setting the stroke color, and handling platform‑specific saving.

add-centered-graph-to-pdf-page.title: Add Centered Graph to PDF Page
add-centered-graph-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a Graph, set its horizontal and vertical alignment to center, configure its appearance with GraphInfo, add it to a page's Paragraphs collection, and save the PDF.

align-graph-left-margin-pdf.title: Align Graph to Left Margin in PDF
align-graph-left-margin-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a Graph object, positioning it with a left offset, adding a simple shape, and saving the updated document.

set-graph-width-height-pdf.title: Set Graph Width and Height in PDF
set-graph-width-height-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph in a PDF, setting its Width and Height properties, adding a rectangle shape, and saving the document with platform‑specific GDI+ handling.

create-dimension-line-pdf-graph.title: Create a Dimension Line in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf Graph
create-dimension-line-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to draw a dimension‑specific horizontal line inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Graph object, including platform‑specific handling for GDI+.

draw-dimension-specific-rectangle-graph.title: Draw Dimension-Specific Rectangle in a PDF Graph
draw-dimension-specific-rectangle-graph.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF document, adding a Graph, drawing a rectangle with explicit dimensions and styling, inserting a text label, and handling GDI+ availability on different platforms.

adjust-ellipse-bounds-in-pdf.title: Adjust Ellipse Position Within PDF Page Bounds
adjust-ellipse-bounds-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ellipse shape, checking if it fits within the page, and repositioning it to stay fully inside the page before saving the document.

log-shape-bounding-boxes-in-pdf-graph.title: Log Bounding Boxes of Shapes in PDF Graphs
log-shape-bounding-boxes-in-pdf-graph.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page's Graph objects, extracts each Shape's bounding rectangle (using reflection when needed), and writes the coordinates to the console.

rotate-graph-in-pdf.title: Rotate a Graph in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf
rotate-graph-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply a rotation transformation to a Graph container in a PDF document and add vector shapes to it using Aspose.Pdf.

translate-graph-position.title: Translate Graph Position in PDF
translate-graph-position.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph with a rectangle shape in a PDF, then moving the graph by adjusting its Left and Top coordinates before saving the document.

scale-graph-non-uniformly-pdf.title: Scale Graph Non‑Uniformly in PDF
scale-graph-non-uniformly-pdf.description: Demonstrates applying different X and Y scaling rates to an Aspose.Pdf Graph via GraphInfo and visualizing the effect with a rectangle shape, then saving the PDF with platform‑specific handling.

skew-graph-x-axis-pdf.title: Skew Graph on X Axis in PDF
skew-graph-x-axis-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph, adding a rectangle shape, applying an X‑axis skew via GraphInfo.SkewAngleX, and saving the PDF while handling platform‑specific GDI+ availability.

apply-clipping-region-to-pdf-graph.title: Apply Clipping Region to PDF Graph
apply-clipping-region-to-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates defining a rectangular clipping path on a PDF page and rendering a graph so that only the portions inside the rectangle are visible, with platform‑specific handling for GDI+.

add-semi-transparent-rectangle-graph-lay.title: Add Semi-Transparent Rectangle Using Graph Layer
add-semi-transparent-rectangle-graph-lay.description: Demonstrates how to begin a transparency layer with Aspose.Pdf's Graph container, draw a semi‑transparent rectangle, and end the layer by adding the graph to a PDF page.

create-custom-star-shape-pdf.title: Create Custom Star Shape in PDF
create-custom-star-shape-pdf.description: Shows how to compute star vertices, build a closed Path with Line segments, apply fill and stroke colors, and embed the shape in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Graph objects.

add-regular-hexagon-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Regular Hexagon to PDF Graph
add-regular-hexagon-to-pdf-graph.description: Shows how to create a Graph, calculate the vertices of a regular hexagon, draw its sides with custom border color and thickness, and embed the shape in a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-dashed-polyline-annotation.title: Insert Dashed Polyline Annotation into PDF
insert-dashed-polyline-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a polyline annotation with multiple vertices to a PDF page and apply a dashed line style using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-inside-graph-pdf.title: Add Text Inside a Graph with Font Settings in PDF
add-text-inside-graph-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a Graph container with a background rectangle, and place a styled TextFragment at specific coordinates inside the graph.

add-background-image-and-draw-shapes.title: Add Background Image to PDF Page and Draw Shapes on Top
add-background-image-and-draw-shapes.description: Demonstrates how to set a background image for a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf and overlay a graph with rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes on top of the image.

insert-scaled-rotated-image-into-pdf-gra.title: Insert Scaled and Rotated Image into PDF Graph
insert-scaled-rotated-image-into-pdf-gra.description: Shows how to add a Graph container to a PDF page and place an external image using ImageStamp, applying proportional scaling and an arbitrary rotation angle.

create-new-pdf-default-page.title: Create a New PDF with a Default Page
create-new-pdf-default-page.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document, add a single default‑size page, and save it using Aspose.Pdf.

create-full-page-graph-pdf.title: Create a Full-Page Graph in a PDF
create-full-page-graph-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, obtaining the page width and height, creating a Graph object that matches those dimensions, optionally adding a rectangle shape, and inserting the graph into the page before saving.

add-red-filled-rectangle-to-pdf.title: Add a Red Filled Rectangle to a PDF with Graph
add-red-filled-rectangle-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a Graph canvas, draw a rectangle using absolute coordinates, and apply a solid red fill.

semi-transparent-ellipse-pdf.title: Create Semi-Transparent Ellipse in PDF
semi-transparent-ellipse-pdf.description: Shows how to draw an ellipse with a semi‑transparent fill color using Aspose.Pdf's Graph and Ellipse classes and save the PDF.

insert-centered-textfragment-into-graph-.title: Insert Centered TextFragment into a Graph Rectangle
insert-centered-textfragment-into-graph-.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a Graph containing a rectangle shape, and adds a centered "Hello World" TextFragment inside that rectangle.

enable-boundscheckmode-graph-validation.title: Enable BoundsCheckMode to Validate Graph Shape Placement
enable-boundscheckmode-graph-validation.description: Demonstrates how to activate BoundsCheckMode.ThrowExceptionIfDoesNotFit on an Aspose.Pdf Graph to ensure that added shapes fit within the defined graph area, with optional overflow handling.

add-shapes-with-bounds-checking-to-pdf.title: Add Shapes with Bounds Checking and Logging to PDF
add-shapes-with-bounds-checking-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding rectangle shapes inside a Graph container, performing pre‑validation and catching Aspose.Pdf.BoundsOutOfRangeException, and logging the coordinates of out‑of‑bounds shapes. Includes platform‑specific handling for saving the document.

add-non-overlapping-random-rectangles-to.title: Add Non-Overlapping Random Rectangles to a PDF Graph
add-non-overlapping-random-rectangles-to.description: Demonstrates placing multiple random-sized rectangles on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf while ensuring they do not overlap by performing bounds intersection checks before adding them to a Graph.

create-graph-with-rectangle-ellipse.title: Create Graph with Rectangle and Ellipse Shapes in PDF
create-graph-with-rectangle-ellipse.description: Demonstrates how to build a Graph, add a rectangle and an ellipse with distinct fill and stroke settings, and embed the graph into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-to-memorystream-and-save-to-f.title: Export PDF to MemoryStream and Save to File
export-pdf-to-memorystream-and-save-to-f.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it into a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream contents to a physical file on disk.

add-page-draw-shapes-graph.title: Add a New Page and Draw Shapes Using Graph
add-page-draw-shapes-graph.description: The example loads an existing PDF, adds a blank page, creates a Graph container, draws a rectangle, ellipse, and line, and saves the modified document.

add-graph-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Graph Watermark to PDF Pages
add-graph-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: The example iterates through PDF files in a folder, adds a Graph containing a rectangle shape as a watermark to every page, and saves the modified documents to an output folder.

add-gradient-ellipse-graph-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Gradient Ellipse Graph to PDF Pages Concurrently
add-gradient-ellipse-graph-to-pdf-pages.description: The example loads multiple PDF files in parallel, creates a full‑page graph on each page, and fills it with a series of ellipses whose colors gradually change to simulate a gradient. The modified PDFs are saved to an output folder.

custom-dashed-border-graph-pdf.title: Create Custom Dashed Border with Graph in PDF
custom-dashed-border-graph-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to set line width and dash pattern via GraphInfo and draw a rectangle as a custom border inside a Graph object, then save the PDF with platform‑specific handling.

set-rectangle-fill-opacity-50.title: Set Rectangle Fill Opacity to 50% in PDF
set-rectangle-fill-opacity-50.description: Demonstrates creating a semi‑transparent rectangle in a PDF by using an ARGB color with 50% opacity and printing its ARGB value for verification.

create-sample-graph-for-pdf.title: Create Sample Graph with Shapes for PDF Page
create-sample-graph-for-pdf.description: Shows how to build a reusable Aspose.Pdf Graph containing a rectangle, ellipse, and line, then add it to a PDF page.

create-pdf-with-graph-to-byte-array.title: Create PDF with Graph and Serialize to Byte Array
create-pdf-with-graph-to-byte-array.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a simple graph using Aspose.Pdf, handle platform‑specific GDI+ requirements, and serialize the document to a byte array for transmission.

deserialize-pdf-add-graph-labels.title: Deserialize PDF from Byte Array and Add Graph with Labels
deserialize-pdf-add-graph-labels.description: The example loads a PDF from a byte array, creates a Graph with rectangle and line shapes, adds text labels, and saves the modified document.

pdf-report-bar-graph-legend.title: Create PDF Report with Bar Graph and Legend
pdf-report-bar-graph-legend.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF document containing a simple bar graph with colored rectangles for data categories and an accompanying legend using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rounded-rectangle-with-fill.title: Add Rounded Rectangle with Fill to PDF
add-rounded-rectangle-with-fill.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph, draw a rectangle with rounded corners, apply a solid fill color, and save the document.

create-rotate-ellipse-in-pdf-graph.title: Create and Rotate an Ellipse in a PDF Graph
create-rotate-ellipse-in-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to add an ellipse to a Graph container, rotate it 45° using a transformation matrix, and save the result as a PDF.

create-pdf-collage-with-multiple-graphs.title: Create PDF Collage with Multiple Graphs
create-pdf-collage-with-multiple-graphs.description: Shows how to add several Graph objects (rectangle, ellipse, line) at different coordinates on a single PDF page to build a collage.

apply-clipping-region-to-pdf-shapes.title: Apply Clipping Region to PDF Shapes
apply-clipping-region-to-pdf-shapes.description: Shows how to use the Clip and EOClip operators to restrict drawing of shapes within a defined rectangular area on a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf.

multi-page-pdf-full-page-graphs.title: Create Multi-Page PDF with Full-Page Graphs
multi-page-pdf-full-page-graphs.description: Shows how to generate a PDF with several pages, each containing a Graph that matches the page size, and includes platform‑specific handling for GDI+ availability.

handle-bounds-checking-errors-pdf.title: Handle Bounds Checking Errors When Adding Shapes to PDF
handle-bounds-checking-errors-pdf.description: Demonstrates enabling bounds checking for a Graph, adding a rectangle that exceeds the page size, catching the BoundsOutOfRangeException, and logging detailed shape coordinates before saving the PDF.

create-pdf-shapes-configurable-fill-colo.title: Create PDF Shapes with Configurable Fill Colors
create-pdf-shapes-configurable-fill-colo.description: Demonstrates building a PDF document with a Graph container, adding Rectangle, Ellipse, and Line shapes whose fill colors are defined in an external JSON configuration file.

add-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Dashed Rectangle to PDF Graph
add-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf-graph.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph container, define a rectangle with a 2‑point dashed border, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-insert-logo-rectangle-into-pdfs.title: Batch Insert Logo Rectangle into PDFs
batch-insert-logo-rectangle-into-pdfs.description: Loads each PDF from a source folder, adds a Graph containing a rectangle that represents a company logo, and saves the modified documents to an output folder.

create-pdf-with-graph-memorystream.title: Create PDF with Graph Using MemoryStream
create-pdf-with-graph-memorystream.description: Generates a PDF in memory, adds a simple graph (a rectangle) to a page, and returns the PDF as a byte array, with platform‑specific handling for GDI+ dependencies.

add-graph-to-pdf.title: Add Graph to PDF Document
add-graph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, creating a Graph container with rectangle and line shapes, positioning it on the first page, and saving the modified file.

pdf-graph-shapes-proportional-pages.title: Create PDF with Proportional Graph Shapes on Each Page
pdf-graph-shapes-proportional-pages.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF where each page contains a graph whose shapes (rectangle, ellipse, line) are sized and positioned proportionally to the page dimensions.

add-shapes-to-pdf-using-dictionary.title: Add Shapes to PDF Using Dictionary for Fill Colors
add-shapes-to-pdf-using-dictionary.description: Shows how to map shape identifiers to fill colors with a dictionary and apply those colors when drawing rectangles, ellipses, and lines in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-ellipse-with-border-and-centered-tex.title: Add Ellipse with Border and Centered Text to PDF
add-ellipse-with-border-and-centered-tex.description: Shows how to draw an ellipse with a thick border and semi‑transparent fill and place a centered TextFragment inside it using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-graph-with-text-fragments.title: Create PDF with Graph Shapes and TextFragments Using Various Fonts
pdf-graph-with-text-fragments.description: Demonstrates how to add a Graph container with rectangle and ellipse shapes to a PDF and place TextFragment objects inside them using different fonts, sizes, and colors.

scale-graph-shapes-150-percent.title: Scale Graph Shapes by 150% Using GraphInfo
scale-graph-shapes-150-percent.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 150 % scaling transformation to all shapes in an Aspose.Pdf Graph via the GraphInfo property before rendering the PDF, with cross‑platform save handling.

add-rectangle-with-shadow-to-pdf.title: Add Rectangle with Shadow to PDF
add-rectangle-with-shadow-to-pdf.description: Shows how to draw a rectangle with a drop‑shadow in a PDF by using a Graph container and a semi‑transparent offset duplicate shape.

create-pdf-graph-with-lookup-border-colo.title: Create PDF Graph with Shape Border Colors from Lookup Table
create-pdf-graph-with-lookup-border-colo.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a graph with rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes whose border colors are assigned using a dictionary lookup. Includes platform‑specific handling for GDI+ dependencies.

place-graph-in-pdf-footer.title: Place Graph in PDF Footer
place-graph-in-pdf-footer.description: Demonstrates how to create a Graph, customize its appearance, and embed it into the page footer area with specific margins using Aspose.Pdf.

horizontal-bar-chart-pdf.title: Horizontal Bar Chart Using Aspose.Pdf Graph
horizontal-bar-chart-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a simple horizontal bar chart by adding multiple rectangle shapes to a Graph with incremental X coordinates.

create-pdf-filled-outline-rectangles.title: Create PDF with Filled and Outline Rectangles Using Aspose.Pdf Graph
create-pdf-filled-outline-rectangles.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a graph with both filled shapes and stroke‑only outlines by using Aspose.Pdf's Graph, Rectangle, and GraphInfo objects.

export-graph-to-pdf.title: Export Graph to PDF Document
export-graph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, adding a page, rendering a Graph object with a title, handling GDI+ availability, and saving the document.
